article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his work with prominent industry figures and his own sample pack release.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer recognized for his collaborations with notable figures in the music industry.
He has worked with artists such as DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer, establishing a presence within the global electronic music scene.
Noizekid released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, a collection that includes his samples, loops, and drums used across various productions.
His work is associated with a network of similar artists including ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot.
